title: Canistrum superbum
taxonomy: Canistrum superbum is a species within the family Bromeliaceae, commonly known as the pineapple family. This family includes various epiphytic and terrestrial plants, primarily found in the Americas. The Bromeliaceae family is further divided into several subfamilies, with Canistrum being part of the subfamily Pitcairnioideae. Within this subfamily, Canistrum superbum is classified as a species of the genus Canistrum. The classification of Canistrum superbum reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary relationships with other plants in the Bromeliaceae family.
